titleEn: dsm-firmenich launches Sustell™ Carbon Value Program to drive progress towards agri-food sustainability targets
titleZh: 帝斯曼-芬美意推出Sustell™碳价值计划，推动农业食品可持续发展目标
summaryZh: 帝斯曼-芬美意动物营养与健康部门宣布推出Sustell™碳价值计划，该计划整合了ISO认证的碳足迹测量、减排转移协议以及动物营养与可持续发展专业知识，帮助农业食品价值链以低成本甚至盈利的方式减少碳排放。计划已启动试点项目，连接零售商、生产商和饲料厂，旨在展示可持续转型的可扩展性和商业价值。
featuredReason: 该计划展示了如何通过数字化碳足迹测量和减排转移机制，将养殖环节的减排转化为经济收益，为智慧畜牧行业提供了将可持续发展与商业价值结合的新思路。
contentFull: Market Trends Sustainability dsm-firmenich launches Sustell™ Carbon Value Program to drive progress towards agri-food sustainability targets The Sustell™ Carbon Value Program covers the full set of requirements to reduce carbon footprints while providing a financial upside 3 December 2025 1 minute read By: Laurence Williams dsm-firmenich Animal Nutrition & Health today announced the launch of its Sustell™ Carbon Value Program, a breakthrough solution designed to help the agri-food value chain reduce carbon footprints at low cost – or even at a profit. This program enables companies to decarbonize their value chains, meet sustainability targets, comply with reporting requirements, and benefit financially from the achieved emissions reductions.“Sustainability is about smarter production — getting more from less, cutting waste, and building stronger, more efficient farms and food systems,” said Dr. Heinz Flatnitzer, Global Head of Emissions Value Management at dsm-firmenich Animal Nutrition & Health.“With the Sustell™ Carbon Value Program we help our clients scale carbon reductions with transparency, credibility, and measurable returns. By fostering farm-to-fork collaboration, partners across the value chain can achieve verified emission footprints with full traceability and additional financial value. We invite more companies to join us on this profitable journey toward a more sustainable food system.”Why it mattersAgrifood, retailer, CPGs, and food service companies need to cut greenhouse gas emissions to meet sustainability targets that are driven by commitments, science-based targets, or customer demands. To achieve lower emissions, full value chain collaboration is required.Farming accounts for a large proportion of the environmental footprint of food and beverage products. Innovative and scientifically proven animal nutrition solutions offer an off-the-shelf method to improve farm efficiency, profitabili and sustainability.“On-farm nutritional interventions offer a turn-key way to improve farming income while reducing the Scope 3 environmental emissions of downstream companies in a cost-effective manner,” explained Dr. Flatnitzer. The program packageThe Sustell™ Carbon Value Program covers the full set of requirements to reduce carbon footprints while providing a financial upside. The program package includes:· ISO-assured footprint measurement via the Sustell™ life cycle assessment platform.· The prerequisite protocols to credibly transfer emission reductions across the value chain.· Expertise on animal nutrition and sustainability to deliver impact from farm to fork.As part of the effort, dsm-firmenich Animal Nutrition & Health has initiated pilot projects with various players in the agri-food industry, connecting retailers to producers and feed millers. The pilots are aimed to demonstrate the scalability and positive business value for all value chain players of sustainability transformation. translationZh:
帝斯曼-芬美意动物营养与健康部门今天宣布推出Sustell™碳价值计划，这是一项突破性解决方案，旨在帮助农业食品价值链以低成本——甚至盈利——的方式减少碳足迹。该计划使企业能够实现价值链脱碳、达成可持续发展目标、满足报告要求，并从实现的减排中获得经济收益。

“可持续发展关乎更智能的生产——用更少的资源获得更多产出，减少浪费，并建设更强大、更高效的农场和食品系统，”帝斯曼-芬美意动物营养与健康部门全球排放价值管理负责人Heinz Flatnitzer博士表示。“通过Sustell™碳价值计划，我们帮助客户以透明、可信且可衡量回报的方式扩大碳减排规模。通过促进从农场到餐桌的协作，价值链上的合作伙伴可以实现经过验证的排放足迹，具备完全可追溯性和额外的财务价值。我们邀请更多企业加入我们，共同踏上这条通往更可持续食品系统的盈利之旅。”

**为何重要**

农业食品、零售商、消费品公司和餐饮服务企业需要削减温室气体排放，以履行由承诺、科学碳目标或客户需求驱动的可持续发展目标。要实现更低的排放，需要全价值链的协作。

养殖业在食品和饮料产品的环境足迹中占据了很大比例。创新且经过科学验证的动物营养解决方案提供了一种现成的方法，可以提高农场效率、盈利能力和可持续性。

“农场层面的营养干预提供了一种交钥匙方式，可以在提高养殖收入的同时，以成本有效的方式减少下游企业的范围三环境排放，”Flatnitzer博士解释道。

**计划内容**

Sustell™碳价值计划涵盖了减少碳足迹所需的全部要求，同时提供财务收益。该计划包含：
· 通过Sustell™生命周期评估平台进行ISO认证的足迹测量。
· 用于在价值链中可信地转移减排量的必要协议。
· 动物营养与可持续发展方面的专业知识，以实现在从农场到餐桌各个环节的影响力。

作为该计划的一部分，帝斯曼-芬美意动物营养与健康部门已与农业食品行业的多个参与者启动了试点项目，将零售商与生产商和饲料厂连接起来。这些试点旨在展示可持续转型对所有价值链参与者的可扩展性和积极商业价值。
contentHtml:
dsm-firmenich launches Sustell™ Carbon Value Program to drive progress towards agri-food sustainability targets 
The Sustell™ Carbon Value Program covers the full set of requirements to reduce carbon footprints while providing a financial upside
